mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, phase, slots, last_recommendations, created_at, updated_at FROM diet_sessions WHERE id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE diet_sessions SET phase = #{phase}, slots = #{slots}, last_recommendations = #{lastRecommendations}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diet_messages (session_id, role, content, intent, agent_trace_id, created_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{intent}, #{traceId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.session_id, m.role, m.content, m.intent, m.agent_trace_id, m.created_at FROM diet_messages m INNER JOIN diet_sessions s ON s.id = m.session_id AND s.user_id = #{userId} WHERE m.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
